parsed_review.summary: CP00-534 is a descriptor-only closeout pack covering RP17.P05.M06.S09-S18 (Synthetic Fixture Set, risk class A, 10 units). Verified through read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) across manifest, contract projection, registry bindings, service/validators source, tests, validation script, README, and the live next-pack queue. The pack is internally consistent at every layer: deliverable distribution {implementation:3, security_audit:2, fixture:1, test:3, hermes_evidence:1}=10 matches baseline/manifest/registry/validator; CP00-534 is the legitimate successor to live-latest CP00-533 with matching source_ledger_sha 13c7ed65. Descriptor-only boundaries are enforced everywhere (descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, raw_payload_included:false plus the full freezeCp534Result no-write/no-runtime/no-leak attestation); a grep of packages/ai-governance/src and the validator found no write/network/exec primitives. The pack does NOT over-claim: production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, status implemented_pending_review. Claude's read-only/non-final-approver boundary and the no-enterprise-trust-from-local-validation boundary are asserted in the no-write attestation, descriptor authority_boundary, tests, and validator deepEqual checks. Hermes patterns appear only as deterministic evidence-packet descriptors (H17), not product runtime (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false). command-evidence.json records all required validation commands at exit_code 0, and readiness auth-preflight passed with non-zero well-formed JSON. forbidden_review_evidence correctly covers auth failures, zero-byte, malformed JSON, fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing fields; no invalid review attempts are present. All 7 required public exports exist (2 in service.js, 5 in validators.js) and are re-exported via index.js. Absent post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) are expected at this read_only_claude_run stage and are not defects. No findings at any severity.
